mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.reconciliation_batches_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, batch_date, period_start, period_end, gateway_type, reconciliation_method, matched_count, mismatch_count, auto_resolved_count, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT rb.id, rb.tenant, NOW(), rb.batch_date, rb.period_start, rb.period_end, rb.gateway_type, rb.reconciliation_method, COALESCE(rb.matched_count, 0), COALESCE(rb.mismatch_count, 0), COALESCE(rb.auto_resolved_count, 0), rb.state_id, rb.flow_id, rb.created_time, rb.last_modified_time FROM hm_reconciliation.reconciliation_batches rb
